# Juan Manuel Garcia — BI Analyst

> Bilingual (EN/ES) Business Intelligence Analyst based in Miami, FL.
> Specializing in Power BI, SQL automation, and commercial data strategy.
> Available for hire — STEM OPT authorized through 2027.

## Who I Am

Juan Manuel Garcia is a bilingual (English/Spanish) Business Intelligence Analyst based in Miami, Florida. He connects data to business decisions — building automated SQL and Power BI systems that replace manual workflows and surface real margin opportunities.

He holds a B.S. in Computer Information Systems and Computer Science from Missouri Valley College (2024, GPA 3.3, Minor in Business Administration) and a Postgraduate Specialist certification in Artificial Intelligence from Racks Academy, Spain (2025).

He is authorized to work in the United States under STEM OPT through 2027.

## Current Role

**Business & BI Analyst — AMG Global Distribution, Miami FL**
September 2024 – Present

Built the company's BI infrastructure from scratch, replacing manual Excel workflows with an automated SQL and Power BI system that cut reporting time by 80%. Created a profitability model to track margin at the SKU level, improving data accuracy by 25%. Worked closely with Sales and IT to define KPIs for inventory and revenue tracking.

## Core Skills

### Technical
- Power BI (DAX, Power Query, Dashboard Design, Report Automation)
- SQL Server (CTEs, Views, Data Modeling, Data Cleaning)
- Azure Log Analytics and KQL (Kusto Query Language)
- Sage ERP integration to SQL pipelines
- Advanced Excel, Notion, AI-enhanced workflows

### Business
- Sales forecasting and margin tracking
- KPI definition and performance measurement
- Revenue Operations (RevOps)
- Workflow optimization and process documentation (SOPs)
- Stakeholder reporting and executive communication

## Key Projects

### Sales and Profitability Dashboard — AMG Global Distribution
Central Power BI dashboard connected to SQL Server via Sage ERP. Tracks domestic and international sales in real time. First time the company had visibility into real per-product margins — used directly for pricing and purchasing decisions. Reduced reporting time 80%, improved data accuracy 25%.
Stack: SQL Server, Power BI, DAX, Sage ERP

### BI Usage Tracking System
KQL scripts analyzing Power BI Activity Logs in Azure to measure report adoption by user, frequency, and department. Helped leadership make data-driven decisions about which analytics tools were worth maintaining.
Stack: KQL, Azure Log Analytics, Power BI Service

### Operations and Request Management System
Kanban-style intake system in Notion to centralize data requests and replace a disorganized email process. Created SOPs for recurring requests and an audit trail of completed projects.
Stack: Notion, SOP Writing, Task Management

## Education

Minor: Business Administration, GPA: 3.3

Postgraduate Specialist in Artificial Intelligence — Racks Academy, Spain (2025)
Focus: Generative AI for Business, LLM Integration, Data Strategy

## Certifications
